title: Gem Ore Glow
description: Requires OptiFine to Work! This resource pack makes Diamond Ore, Deepslate Diamond Ore, and Emerald Ore glow in the dark. This does not make them glow through walls.
body: Requires OptiFine to Work! This resource pack makes Diamond Ore, Deepslate Diamond Ore, and Emerald Ore glow in the dark. This does not make them glow through walls.
